jobs.description:
About memodio

memodio is a digital health application (DiGA) fighting forgetfulness and dementia 🧠 . Our app is prescribed by doctors, fully reimbursed by German statutory health insurance, and recommended by leading medical associations. In a clinical trial with 140 participants, we demonstrated that our app measurably improves memory performance, everyday independence, and quality of life.
